name: GH_BackgroundStyle
summary: Enumerates the pre-defined canvas background themes.

enum_values.name: Solid
enum_values.summary: Canvas background will be a single, solid colour.

enum_values.name: Hatch
enum_values.summary: Canvas background will be a GDI hatch brush.

enum_values.name: GradientLeftRight
enum_values.summary: Canvas background will be a linear horizontal gradient.

enum_values.name: GradientTopBottom
enum_values.summary: Canvas background will be a linear vertical gradient.
